hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -z "$file" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '/i18n/.*\.json$'; then python3 -c "import json,sys; json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print('JSON valid: ' + sys.argv[1].split(chr(47))[-1])" "$file" 2>&1 || echo 'INVALID JSON in '$file; fi

cmd=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"command":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'prisma migrate|prisma db push'; then echo 'Reminder: run npm run prisma:generate after schema changes'; fi
